summary: FIX ROUND 9 (test round-4 finding TEST-014, major — board columns didn't scroll so a tall column, e.g. changelog with 9 shipped cards, overflowed the terminal and cards were cut off): added per-column vertical windowing in the Go TUI (new cli/internal/tui/window.go; Model gains colOffset[4]). Each column MEASURES every card's height with lipgloss.Height (cards are multi-line bordered boxes — measured, not assumed) and renders only the WHOLE cards that fit in colAvail = height-5 (terminal minus header/status/help=3 and the column head+blank=2). fitEnd() packs whole cards from the offset and reserves a row for a '↑ N more' indicator when start>0 and '↓ N more' when cards are hidden below (optimistic-then-reserve two-pass so counts never overflow), always showing ≥1 card so a tiny terminal degrades to the focused card (no negative slice, no panic). reflowColumns() runs on every board-affecting transition (nav/filter/reload/resize): the FOCUSED column scrolls-into-view via scrollWindow() (snap up when the cursor is above the window, advance one card when below — focused card always fully visible), while NON-focused columns keep their offset (independent scrolling), re-clamped to lastFitStart() so no empty space trails the last card; filter shrink pulls an over-scrolled offset back to a valid range (empty column → 0). fsnotify reloads capture the focused slug and refocus() restores the cursor to it (else clamps) before the reflow so it stays visible. A per-column position hint (e.g. 'changelog (9) · 4–5') is appended to the header, shown ONLY on overflow. Tests (new window_test.go): pure fitEnd/scrollWindow/lastFitStart math (varying + tall heights, cursor-follow, max-offset), tiny-height degradation, empty column, and model/View integration (indicators+hint hidden when all fit / shown with correct counts+range when windowed, scroll-into-view keeps the focused card visible to the bottom, filter-shrink offset clamp, refocus follow/clamp, reload reflow no-panic). GATES: gofmt -l clean, go vet clean, go test -race ./... green. LIVE tmux (session gogo-test-f9, 200x20 on the REAL repo, 9 changelog cards): board fits 20 rows; changelog '· 1–2' + two cards + '↓ 7 more'; scrolling down the window follows (mid '· 4–5', '↑ 3 more' + '↓ 4 more') and the last card 'pipeline-commands' is fully visible at '· 8–9' with '↑ 7 more' and no '↓'. state.md untouched. --- FIX ROUND 8 (test round-3 UAT findings TEST-009..012 — three surfaces): TEST-009 (terminal markdown readability, cli/) — replaced WithStandardStyle(dark|light) with a CUSTOM glamour StyleConfig (new cli/internal/tui/mdstyle.go, built once per variant from glamour's Dark/Light base): ~2 document margin, airier block spacing (blank line after paragraphs/lists via BlockSuffix + a blank line above every heading via Heading.BlockPrefix cascading to H1-H6), a clear heading hierarchy on the board's TONE accents (H1 bold accent title with glamour's inverse block dropped; H2 green; H3 amber; H4 faint), stronger Strong + inline code on a subtle background fill, and a calm italic blockquote + quieter rule. Fresh-pointer discipline leaves glamour's package vars untouched. Shared by BOTH the TUI async renderer (renderMarkdownContent) and the `gogo view` stdout path (view.go, dark via lipgloss.HasDarkBackground) through tui.MarkdownStyle(dark); no WithAutoStyle so the TEST-003 freeze stays fixed. TEST-010 (page scrolling, cli/) — updateViewer wires the viewport paging set: space/b + PgDn/PgUp = full page, d/u (+ctrl+d/u) = half page, g/G = top/bottom, j/k+arrows keep line scroll; all cache-only (bubbles/viewport slices its stored lines — no per-keypress re-render; the width-keyed render cache is only touched on a real width change). Key-conflict resolution: space/d/u page ONLY in the viewer (board space=select, d=ship untouched); the G=glow shortcut MOVED to the file-list (drill) context (updateDrill G→openInGlow), freeing G in the viewer for GotoBottom; footer/help lines updated on both screens. TEST-011 (closing summary, plugin markdown) — plan.md shape (gogo-plan/SKILL.md) and report.md (gogo-knowledge/SKILL.md + templates/report.template.md) now END with '## Summary (TL;DR)' (plan: what/why/approach/next; report: what shipped + review/test verdicts + follow-ups pointer), plus the matching article-guidance bullets; docs/cli-contract.md checked and left untouched (it does not enumerate plan/report sections); existing artifacts unchanged. TEST-012 (web viewer expand-to-modal, assets/viewer/) — a ⛶ expand control per figure.diagram opens a single shared near-fullscreen overlay (dark scrim, ~95vw/92vh panel, z-index 9999); on open the figure's .viewport DOM node is MOVED into the modal and REFIT via each renderer's own fit (render.js rich returns refit=fitAll+draw; fallbackViewport returns refit=fit) using a double-rAF; close via ✕ / Esc / scrim click moves the node back and refits to the original size; only one modal at a time; pure offline DOM. Resynced the embedded copies (make sync-assets → cli/internal/pages/assets, byte-identical bar the exempt mermaid.min.js) and rebuilt. EVIDENCE: gofmt clean, go vet clean, go test -race ./... green (style-config + paging-routing tests added incl. the context-dependent d/space/G behavior); node --check clean; a headless Chrome DOM smoke asserted expand→open→Esc/scrim/✕ close→node-restored + the one-modal invariant (PASS). state.md untouched; the 0.8.0 writer and Stage A emission texts untouched. --- FIX ROUND 7 (test round-2 finding TEST-008, major — diagram render quality): replaced the internal minimal ASCII flowchart renderer with the mermaid-ascii engine (github.com/AlexanderGrooff/mermaid-ascii, MIT, tag 1.3.0 / commit aca241698ec7) for clean Unicode box-drawing + real sequence-diagram support. The round-3 concern (its renderer pulling gin/sonic) was RE-VERIFIED empirically rather than re-assumed: a probe binary + `go mod why gin` + `go version -m` proved that importing upstream's clean pkg/sequence + pkg/diagram links ZERO gin/sonic/cobra — so the SEQUENCE renderer is imported directly. Upstream's GRAPH renderer, though, lives in package `cmd` beside cmd/web.go (imports gin-gonic) and Go links whole packages, so the graph path is VENDORED into cli/internal/diagram/mermaidascii/ (upstream MIT LICENSE + doc.go attribution), trimmed to the render files: cobra/gin cmd surface excluded, logrus -> no-op logger (log.go), gookit/color dropped (plain-text output). New facade cli/internal/diagram/ascii.go: Render(source, width) (string, error) -> Unicode for flowchart/graph AND sequenceDiagram; class/state/er -> ErrUnsupported (labeled-source fallback kept in callers). sanitizeFlowchart strips classDef/class/style/linkStyle (they leaked as nodes); sanitizeSequence maps actor->participant and drops Note/control-flow so real diagrams render; Render never panics (boundary recover). Both consumption points rewired: the drill-in .mmd viewer (renderDiagramFile, width-plumbed) and the markdown fence pre-processor (preprocessMermaid/renderMermaidBlock) — sequence fences upgraded from labeled-source to real rendering; the old internal box/topoOrder renderer deleted. Tests updated (diagram: Unicode boxes+arrows for flow, sequence renders incl. actor/Note sanitize, class/er -> ErrUnsupported, empty/garbage -> fallback no panic; markdown: flow+sequence -> Unicode, class -> labeled source, malformed/garbage -> labeled source; +vendored-package smoke test). Binary: `go version -m /tmp/gogo-f7` has NO gin/sonic/cobra/logrus/gookit; size delta +270KB vs a stubbed-diagram baseline (pkg/sequence + orderedmap/v2 + vendored graph); startup unchanged (~10-20ms --version). Gates: gofmt clean, go vet clean, go test -race ./... green, go build -o /tmp/gogo-f7. LIVE tmux (session gogo-test-f7, read-only on the real repo): drill-in charts/cli-cockpit-flow.mmd rendered as Unicode boxes+routed arrows (classDef stripped); report/sequence.mmd rendered participants + solid/dotted/self arrows (actor sanitized, Note dropped); report/report.md's embedded flowchart + sequence fences rendered as Unicode in the glamour view (no raw ```mermaid). state.md untouched. --- FIX ROUND 6 (test round-2 user-acceptance findings TEST-003..007, all in the Go TUI cli/internal/tui): TEST-003 blocker — 'v' froze the UI for minutes. ROOT-CAUSED (measured, not guessed): renderMarkdown built the glamour renderer with WithAutoStyle() synchronously inside Update() on the UI goroutine; WithAutoStyle -> termenv.HasDarkBackground() -> termStatusReport issues an OSC-11 + CSI-6n terminal query and blocks on waitForData(OSCTimeout=5s), but Bubble Tea already owns stdin so the reply is stolen and termenv times out 5s per query, re-run on every view (fresh renderer each time) — the UI goroutine wedges (go test saw ~4ms only because it has no TTY and short-circuits to NoTTYStyleConfig). Fixed by (1) detecting the background ONCE in New() before tea.Program starts (lipgloss.HasDarkBackground) and rendering markdown with an explicit WithStandardStyle(dark|light) — zero queries in the hot path; (2) moving ALL viewer rendering off the UI goroutine into a tea.Cmd with an immediate 'rendering…' loading state + bubbles/spinner (viewerContentMsg); (3) caching rendered output per (kind|path|width), re-rendering on WindowSizeMsg only when width changed. TEST-004 — 'v' now opens the column's default (ready->report/report.md|legacy; plan->plan.md; changelog->entry report.md; in-progress->file list; missing->file list) via defaultArtifact(); enter stays the file list. TEST-005 — new preprocessMermaid() rewrites ```mermaid fences before glamour: flowcharts->internal ASCII in a code block (+ derivable title); other kinds->'[mermaid <kind> — press w …]' label + source (diagram.Kind added); malformed recovers to labeled source, never panics. TEST-006 — green ● session marker on cards whose gogo-* session is live + a focused-card attach hint, refreshed on reload AND a 5s tea.Tick ticker (sessionsMsg). TEST-007 — bordered lipgloss cards (styles.go, styles precomputed once), full-card focus highlight that moves with the cursor, ✓ for selected-for-ship, per-column TONE adaptive accents + colored headers/counts. New files: styles.go, markdown.go, markdown_test.go; +5 model/preprocessor tests (64 tests total, all green). Gates: gofmt clean, go vet clean, go test -race ./... green, go build -o /tmp/gogo-f6. LIVE tmux (scratch fixture, read-only on real repo): v on ready opened report at 15ms(loading)/43-85ms(content) — the round-5 binary under identical TERM=xterm-256color stayed frozen with no viewer in 12s; v per column hit the right default incl. in-progress->file list; the ready report's mermaid flow fence rendered as ASCII (no DSL) and its sequence fence as a labeled source; a real gogo-go-ready session lit the ready card's ● session dot within one ticker and cleared it on kill; capture-pane showed the bordered cards + the full-card highlight moving on Down. state.md untouched. --- FIX ROUND 5 (test round-1 findings TEST-001 blocker + TEST-002 major, both in the Go TUI): TEST-001 — the FR5 launch forms were unsubmittable live. Two coupled defects: (a) the top-level tui.Update() forwarded only tea.KeyMsg to the active huh form while in modeForm and dropped every other message, so huh's async nextFieldMsg/nextGroupMsg advance/submit protocol never round-tripped — fixed by making the final fallback forward ALL messages to updateForm (widened tea.KeyMsg->tea.Msg; WindowSizeMsg also reaches the form for layout); (b) exposed once routing was fixed, the fields were bound with .Value(&m.confirm)/.Value(&m.releaseName) into the value-type Model that Bubble Tea copies on every Update, so the form wrote confirm=true into an orphaned copy while the completion check read a stale false and silently cancelled — fixed by relocating the field targets behind a heap-stable *formBinding pointer shared across model copies. Confirm now defaults to the affirmative so Enter/Tab submits-and-launches, and Esc (newly intercepted) joins Ctrl+C as an abort. TEST-002 — a new cancelForm() clears pending intent + binding + form + the ready selection (status 'cancelled') on every abort/cancel, and the successful-launch path now clears selection+pending on the RETURNED model (the old clear ran only on doLaunch's discarded receiver copy), so a later m/d never re-ships a stale target. Added an injectable launcher seam (Model.launcher, defaults to launch.Launch) and 5 model-level regression tests that pump the full huh command graph through Update to StateCompleted/abort and assert the fake launcher fires exactly once (single + merged forms) / never (abort) with the selection cleared. Gates: gofmt clean, go vet clean, go test -race ./... green; live tmux proof on a scratch fixture with a PATH-injected claude stub — 2 ready cards -> d -> Enter -> Enter launched with a single injection-safe argv '/gogo:done board-actions-and-filter+pipeline-commands' in session gogo-done-*, and the Esc path showed 'cancelled' with markers cleared and no second stub call; `gogo status` still correct on the real repo. state.md untouched. --- FIX ROUND 4 (Stage B review round-3 findings): fixed the 4 AGENT-FIXABLE minors/nits and accepted REV-012. REV-008 — badge() now derives the phase from state.md (the column's truth) and takes the round from the latest event only when its phase agrees (knowledge->report map via new contract.EventsPhase), else from state.md's iterations (new Feature.RoundFor), so the live repro (events 'implement r3' + state 'review') now badges 'review r2'; TestBadge extended. REV-009 — README install fixed (Go 1.25+ per go.mod; 'go build -o gogo .' with a go-install-names-it-'cli' caveat). REV-010 — watch set re-armed on every reload via watchPaths()+watchSet.reconcile() (idempotent add/remove); deterministic TestWatchReconcileArmsNewFeature. REV-011 — long-lived watchSet closed on quit (m.quit()->close(), sync.Once, done-channel-guarded send); TestWatchSetCloseGuardsSend, suite green under -race. Gates: gofmt clean, go vet clean, go test ./... all green, go build + live `gogo status` correct on the real repo. state.md untouched. --- Original Stage B build: built the `gogo` CLI (Go module github.com/ZawadzkiB/gogo/cli) against docs/cli-contract.md, plus the deferred FR7/FR8 plugin sweep. Packages: internal/contract (deterministic reader — state.md grammar, the verbatim shipped->ready->in-progress->unfinished classifier incl. members[] + folder-slug fallback, changelog, issues.json, events.jsonl parsed leniently with RFC3339 ts + bad-line skip, charts/report manifests; table-driven fixtures incl. a malformed tree, 17 tests); internal/pages (goldmark GFM `w` builder, .mmd->figure blocks with data-diagram stems, before/after compare pairing by stem, go:embed of the viewer runtime + mermaid.min.js so `w` works offline in any project, golden tests, 5 tests); internal/tui (bubbletea 4-column board + counts + live badge, `/` filter, fsnotify debounced reload, drill-in file list, glamour/issues-table/events-timeline/ASCII-diagram viewers, huh confirm/release-name forms, space-select ready-only, m/d move guards, tmux session list + `a` attach via tea.ExecProcess; pure Update/View tested without a tty, 14 tests); internal/launch (tmux/claude/glow detection, BuildIntent for /gogo:go + merged /gogo:done a+b+c, tmux new-session args + background claude -p fallback with log/pid; arg-building unit tests, 7 tests); internal/diagram (minimal flowchart->ASCII boxes+arrows renderer + source fallback for sequence/class/state, 6 tests); internal/textfmt (shared issues/timeline formatters). cmd wiring: root board, `gogo status` (golden classifier table), `gogo view <slug|:plan|:report|date-name> [--web] [--open]`, `gogo events <slug>`, `gogo --version` = 0.10.0. JUDGEMENT CALL: mermaid-ascii dropped as a dependency — its graph renderer is reachable only through a cobra/gin `cmd` package (gin + bytedance/sonic assembly, a build risk on go1.26 and disproportionate for a ms-startup binary); replaced with the internal renderer + the plan's accepted source-display fallback. GATES: `go vet ./...` clean, `go test ./...` all green (50 tests), `go build -o gogo .` produces the binary (gitignored), gofmt clean, go.sum committed. Live-verified on this repo: `gogo status` = 9 features with classes matching every state.md (5 shipped / 3 ready / 1 in-progress / 0 unfinished), `gogo events cli-cockpit-and-events` shows the Stage A phase-started line, `gogo view cli-cockpit-and-events:plan --web` writes a page under .gogo/resources/view/ with zero unreplaced GOGO_ tokens, zero http(s) refs, compare-mode figures. FR7/FR8 sweep: plugin.json->0.10.0, architecture.md file map gains cli/ (+asset-sync note), README gains a 'The gogo CLI' section, docs/index.md gains a CLI-contract pointer; command count held at 12 slash commands (the CLI is a binary, explicitly not a 13th command). As-built flow confirms the intended chart (no drift) — noted in charts/manifest.json, not redrawn. state.md left untouched per instructions.
